Breathing Exercise.description: Do slow diaphragmatic breathing for 5–7 minutes. Inhale 4s, hold 2–4s, exhale 6s. Repeat gently.
Breathing Exercise.support_message: Your stress looks elevated right now. Let’s take a small, safe step to calm your body. You don’t have to fix everything at once. Try it for about 8 minutes. Do slow diaphragmatic breathing for 5–7 minutes. Inhale 4s, hold 2–4s, exhale 6s. Repeat gently. This is chosen to help slow your heart rate and settle your stress response.

Gentle Stretching.description: Do gentle full-body stretching for 8–15 minutes (neck, shoulders, hips). Avoid over-stretching.
Gentle Stretching.support_message: You’re maintaining well today. Let’s keep your routine supportive and steady with a small wellness step. Try it for about 11 minutes. Do gentle full-body stretching for 8–15 minutes (neck, shoulders, hips). Avoid over-stretching. This is chosen to support better relaxation and sleep recovery.

Guided Meditation.description: Sit comfortably and follow a 10-minute guided meditation focusing on body relaxation and calm awareness.
Guided Meditation.goal: Calm mind, reduce stress, improve recovery

Hydration & Rest Break.description: Drink a glass of water and take a 5–10 minute rest. Sit with shoulders relaxed and soften your breathing.
Hydration & Rest Break.goal: Support recovery, reduce fatigue, stabilize stress

Mindful Walking.description: Take a gentle 5–12 minute mindful walk. Walk slowly, breathe naturally, and notice sounds and surroundings.
Mindful Walking.goal: Regulate mood, improve circulation, reset stress
Mindful Walking.support_message: You’re maintaining well today. Let’s keep your routine supportive and steady with a small wellness step. Try it for about 11 minutes. Take a gentle 5–12 minute mindful walk. Walk slowly, breathe naturally, and notice sounds and surroundings. This is chosen to gently activate your body and improve circulation without strain.

Soothing Music Therapy.description: Listen to calming instrumental music for 10–20 minutes in a quiet space. Keep screen brightness low.
